title: TAC GEAR
body:
![tac gear title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b59f385c172cb30323e59cd21e32214b3a8843.png) ## 🛡️ TAC GEAR 🛡️ TAC GEAR adds tactical equipment, combat utilities, loot systems, medical mechanics, revive gameplay, and immersive combat effects for Minecraft. --- ## ⚠️ Development ⚠️ 🚧 TAC GEAR is actively developed. Some features are still in progress, and bugs may occur. Your feedback and bug reports are welcome! Please report any issues on our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/twQrWHRxmr)**. Expect **frequent updates, feature improvements, and balance tweaks** as the mod evolves. ---
✨ Features - 🛡 Tactical Armor Sets – armor with unique features - 🗡 Combat Gear – tactical weapons like Molotov - 💊 Medical – entire Rescuing system - 🧰 Loot Crates - loot crates to gain some extra loot - 🎆 Kill Effects - custom kill effects - ⚙️ Configurable settings - everything adjustable via / or json - 🛠 Utility & Crafting Items – Tools for crafting tactical gear
💣 Items ### 🛡️ Gear - 🛡️ Gas Mask - 🥷 Balaclava - 🌙 Night Vision Goggles ### 💥 Throwables - 🍾 Molotov Cocktail - ☣️ Gas Grenade - 🌫 Smoke Grenade - 💣 Bomb Strike Grenade ### 🔥 Utility - 🔥 Gas Lighter - 🩹 Self-Revive Stick - 🔋 AAA Battery - ☣️ Gas Filter ### 🧵 Materials - 🧵 Cloth - 🧶 Fabric ### 🛢️ Blocks - 🛢️ Loot Barrel
⚙️ Commands ### ℹ️ Info Commands * `/tac_gear info server` – Shows current TAC GEAR server settings. * `/tac_gear info loot_barrel` – Shows current Loot Barrel settings. ### 🛠 Admin Commands * `/tac_gear admin revive ` – Revives a downed player. ### 🔄 Reload Commands * `/tac_gear reload crate all` – Reloads all tracked crate states. * `/tac_gear reload crate loot_barrel` – Reloads Loot Barrel crate states. ### ⚙️ Server Config Commands * `/tac_gear config server kill-effect flair_gun` – Enables the flare gun kill effect. * `/tac_gear config server kill-effect none` – Disables the active kill effect. * `/tac_gear config server player-revive-system on` – Enables the player revive system. * `/tac_gear config server player-revive-system off` – Disables the player revive system. * `/tac_gear config server revive-countdown ` – Sets the K.O. countdown time. * `/tac_gear config server revive-item ` – Sets the item used for self-revive. ### 🛢 Loot Barrel Config Commands * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel search_time ticks ` – Sets the Loot Barrel search time in ticks. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel search_time seconds ` – Sets the Loot Barrel search time in seconds. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel rolls min ` – Sets the minimum Loot Barrel rolls. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel rolls max ` – Sets the maximum Loot Barrel rolls. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel rolls set ` – Sets the minimum and maximum Loot Barrel rolls. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel add ` – Adds an item to the Loot Barrel loot table. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel remove ` – Removes an item from the Loot Barrel loot table. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel edit chance ` – Changes the drop chance of an item. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel edit min ` – Changes the minimum drop amount of an item. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel edit max ` – Changes the maximum drop amount of an item. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel edit amount ` – Changes the minimum and maximum drop amount of an item. * `/tac_gear config loot_barrel reload` – Reloads the Loot Barrel config. ### 🧪 Debug Commands * `/tac_gear debug summon bomb ` – Summons a bomb explosion with a custom kg value. * `/tac_gear debug summon kill-effect flair_gun` – Summons the flare gun kill effect. * `/tac_gear debug summon kill-effect current` – Summons the currently selected kill effect.
🌍 Languages - 🇺🇸 English - 🇩🇪 German - 🇪🇸 Spanish - 🇷🇺 Russian
📦 Dependencies ### 🔧 Required Mods 🔧 - Curios API | 5.14.1 - Geckolib | 4.8.3 --- ### ☣️ Gas Mask System Compatible With ☣️ - TAC Gear Gas Grenade - more soon...
🎖 Credits - 👑 GF2022 – Owner & Lead Developer - 🗒️ Robbe2023 - Tester
